name: boki

meta.note: [provenance:reference-impl-aligned §6.5 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION 2026-06-20] A corpus-attested tolerant extension: the censorship-marker form [#「X」に「Y」の傍記], where Y (典型的に ×) is written beside X in proletarian-literature redaction restoration (102 corpus occurrences, one shape). It shares the side-note node with the 注記 form but ends in の傍記 after a bare に connector (no の左に), so it round-trips to に…の傍記 rather than の左に…の注記. Reference rendering reuses the aozora-sidenote ruby box. Tagged should, not must: 注記 is the canonical side annotation; 傍記 is a tolerated corpus convention.

source: 革命［＃「革命」に「×」の傍記］の時代。

expected.serialize: 革命［＃「革命」に「×」の傍記］の時代。
